title: stelis triangulisepala
intro: Stelis triangulisepala is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its unique triangular-shaped petals. This plant is used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis triangulisepala are attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Stelis triangulisepala include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat various health conditions.
